items.name: Tee Shirt Cannon
items.description: Shoots tee-shirts at your friends and has them wear the shirts you shot.  You can even customize which shirts come out of the cannon.

items.name: Deputy Bobby's Cowboy Boots
items.description: Sheriff Bobby runs faster and jumps higher than any cowboy in the west. That's why he always gets his man.

items.name: Deluxe Coil Gun
items.description: With lightning in your hand, the future is yours! Shoot electric blue beams of electricity at enemies. Deals 15 damage per hit and stuns enemies for a moment!

items.name: Confusion's Cauldron
items.description: Confuse your enemies motion with this cauldron's powerful potion!

items.name: Exploding Heart
items.description: Equip this exploding heart and click to throw it at your foes.  Anyone near the explosion will be thrown back and take 30-35 points of damage.

items.name: Sleep Wand
items.description: You're getting very sleepy!  Put your nearby foes to sleep for a short while.

items.name: DarkAge Bo Staff
items.description: Slash at your foes with a bo staff to do 15 damage.  Show off your extreme prowess by hitting the 'Q' key to activate the special attack - summon a line of deadly purple flames that will flow in any direction you face.

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Spellbook
items.description: Use the spell contained in this book to help stabilize the warring clans of ROBLOX.  Click to summon a protective shield that you can then fire at enemies.

items.name: Anti-Vampire Stake
items.description: When you invite a vampire over for a "stake" dinner, I don't think they'll appreciate the joke. Lunge at vicious vampires for 20 damage.

items.name: Super Freeze Cannon
items.description: Shoots frozen balls of doom out at a rate of 1 per second.  The balls will slow your enemies and also do 10 damage per hit. Every so often, you'll get the coolest cannonball of all time, it will freeze your enemy for up to 4 seconds.

items.name: Neon Nate: The Horse Lord
items.description: He's not your little pony any more. He's a HORSE!

items.name: Future Crossbow
items.description: Why are we using a primitive weapon like crossbows in the future? Sometimes to go forward, you have to look backward. And they look really cool.

items.name: Beehive
items.description: Drop the beehive to summon killer bees. The bees do 4 damage on impact and there are 15 clusters doing a total of 60 damage per second.

items.name: Black Hole Bomb
items.description: Instead of blowing everything apart, it pulls everything together. The consequences are pretty.

items.name: Mad Morning Star
items.description: Not quite the good morning I was hoping for... Click to swing the mace and do mad damage to your foe.

items.name: Danceblaster 7000
items.description: Best way to disarm your foe?  Make him dance!  Anyone who gets hit with the dance ray won't be able to stop the uncontrollable dance fever!

items.name: Bat-tle Axe
items.description: Can I AXE you a question? I promise to get my POINT across.

items.name: HEX Spitter
items.description: A genuine Hex style laser blaster- shoot lightning lasers at lightning fast rates.

items.name: Flying Carpet of Books
items.description: Reading can take you places. Literally. Books version of the magic carpet; click to activate. Using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or the arrow keys to control the direction it flies. Click again to hop off.

items.name: Elegant Blade
items.description: From a more civilized age.
